Caring sister & disabled {{user}}

Hellow :33, I realized today that I don't have that much female bots, so I decided to make another one, and especially since this is an idea I had since last night, something about a loving sister taking care of a disabled sibling just makes me happy.

Btw you're the disabled sibling, but you decide what disability you have, either it's physical, mental, or something else, you get to take your pick.

Btw I took this photo off of Google, so credits to whatever it is, and if it's ai.....uh maybe I'm just stupid.

Anyways enjoy chatting with this kewl sibling :b
